Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_287e5ade-5b13-40a2-bcf9-607322d84e5f","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_287e5ade-5b13-40a2-bcf9-607322d84e5f"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"66b8129f-76e3-4473-bd25-8487dd1d73f1"},"authorEmail":"j.a.rossiter@sheffield.ac.uk","authorName":"John Anthony Rossiter","authorOrganization":"University of Sheffield","description":"Several people have developed MATLAB based materials to support the teaching of “Control Systems 101” type courses; the particular focus here is on interactive and animated resources which are largely self-explanatory, that is easy to use, and support student understanding and learning. They demonstrate authentic scenarios across a broad range of topics which motivate the importance of control to modern society, alongside some technical learning outcomes to support university curricula.\n\nThis resource provides an interactive app file (MATLAB virtual laboratory) which demonstrates the under-damped behaviour of a suspension system through the artefact of a landing aeroplane. More detailed descriptions and help are in the partner livescript file aeroplanelanding_behaviour_manual.mlx.","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_287e5ade-5b13-40a2-bcf9-607322d84e5f","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_287e5ade-5b13-40a2-bcf9-607322d84e5f"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"7d020cc4-416a-475f-bc2a-220ebbbeef61"},"outputFileName":"Aeroplane Landing Behaviour.mltbx","outputFolder":"/control101/aeroplane landing/matlabCode","summary":"This resource provides an interactive app file which demonstrates the under-damped behaviour of a suspension system.","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_287e5ade-5b13-40a2-bcf9-607322d84e5f","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_287e5ade-5b13-40a2-bcf9-607322d84e5f"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"af7ce2fa-3a1b-4bcd-9bf9-4f523ecc21b9"},"toolboxName":"Aeroplane Landing Behaviour","toolboxVersion":"1.0","uniqueId":"b481ef9e-3b06-4c56-8663-90285c41fd38"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"fa57a3ef-c362-4174-8169-62bf727e9a02"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"4e7a85d9-a871-43ee-b12b-caac70bf3d9e"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
